would our redesign address that?

hmm.. I don't like these 2: Outcome field has no control-char check — validate_cycle_params outcome arm checks length only, unlike general fields which also call check_control_chars. This asymmetry is pre-existing, not introduced by this fix. Track separately if needed.

Emoji accepted as phase names — validate_phase_field permits any non-space, non-control character, so emoji phase values (e.g., "🟩" x 64) are valid after the fix. This is intentional per the pre-existing allowlist policy; the fix does not change which characters are accepted, only how many are counted.
